data.title: Best AI for Trading (I Tested Them All)
data.summary: Best AI for Trading (I Tested Them All)
data.description:
Which AI is the best for trading? I tested every major AI tool (Claude, OpenAI ChatGPT, TradingView Remix, DeepSeek, xAI) and found the best one for each use-case: finding trade setups, scanning the markets for breakouts before they pump hard, creating and backtesting trading strategies with AI, optimizing strategy parameters, and automating everything on your exchange. I also share my honest take on AI trading agents - and why handing your portfolio to a black box might be the biggest mistake you can make right now!
